sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and 10 < n['pixels'] < 50:
        print(f"Player: boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check area below player
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nArea below player (cols 34-46):")
for i in range(6, 20):
    row = ascii_lines[i]
    segment = row[34:46]
    compressed = ''.join(c if c != 'W' else '.' for c in segment)
    print(f"Row {i:2d}: [{compressed}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
